name: EvolveClaw SCOPE
description: Evolves the agent system prompt using SCOPE — synthesizes guidelines from execution traces to continuously improve agent performance.

serverUrl.label: SCOPE Server URL
serverUrl.help: URL of the SCOPE sidecar server (default: http://127.0.0.1:5757).

agentName.label: Agent Name
agentName.help: Unique identifier for this agent in SCOPE's memory (default: openclaw-agent).

enabled.label: Enable Prompt Evolution
enabled.help: Toggle SCOPE prompt evolution on/off without uninstalling.

injectMode.label: Injection Mode
injectMode.help: Where to inject SCOPE guidelines: append_system (system prompt, cacheable), prepend_context (user prompt, per-turn), or both.
